message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker state

Update .beads/issues.jsonl to reflect current task progress:
- Mark completed test implementation tasks as done
- Update in-progress items with latest status
- Sync dependency relationships

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-1hac","title":"ACFS tool registry integration","description":"Background:
- Gateway setup/detection currently hardcodes tool lists and install metadata.
- ACFS (agentic_coding_flywheel_setup) now owns the canonical manifest + checksums for the stack.

Goal:
- Make ACFS manifest the single source of truth for tool metadata in this public gateway repo.

Scope:
- Define mapping types, loader, registry service, and integrate into setup/detection endpoints.

Non-goals:
- Do not embed any private infrastructure or business content.
- Do not implement installers; only surface metadata + commands.

Why this matters:
- Reduces drift across repos, keeps UI and detection in lockstep, and centralizes tool inventory decisions.

Tests / Verification (detailed logging required):
- Unit/integration: bd-1rdc, bd-6huy, bd-1kkl.
- Contract: bd-2lvp, bd-1jdm.
- E2E: bd-1uog.
- Harness: bd-a1jg.

Definition of Done:
- /setup endpoints and detection use registry-driven metadata.
- Readiness output aligns with manifest and is auditable via provenance fields.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:25:36.404946939Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T06:43:23.643864530Z","closed_at":"2026-01-27T06:43:23.643716150Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["acfs","integration","registry"]}

 {"id":"bd-2wwp","title":"Tests: NTM backpressure + rate limiting","description":"Goal:\n- Add tests for NTM ingest backpressure/throttling.\n\nScope:\n- Rate limit behavior, batching, and critical event delivery.\n- Structured logging assertions for throttling decisions.\n\nDefinition of Done:\n- Tests validate rate limits and do not drop critical events.","notes":"Implementation:
- Extended apps/gateway/src/__tests__/ntm-ws-bridge.service.test.ts
- Added 9 new tests in "Backpressure behavior" section:
  - High volume handling: burst of 100 events, sustained load, event order
  - Rate limit edge cases: under limit, limit+1, empty queue after flush
  - Debounce and rate limit interaction
  - Stats tracking: lastFlushTime updates, accurate after multiple ops
- Total: 21 tests pass (was 12, added 9)
- Tests validate rate limits and proper event dropping behavior","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:49:01.613349781Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T21:41:44.346975408Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T21:41:44.346928530Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ntm","performance","tests"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2wwp","depends_on_id":"bd-284u","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:49:01.638783038Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2wwp","depends_on_id":"bd-pbt2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:49:17.809555600Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

-{"id":"bd-2yw3","title":"Unit tests for manifest provenance fields","description":"Goal:
- Add focused UNIT tests validating manifest provenance fields are correctly populated.

Scope:
- Test that path, hash, version are set in readiness responses (unit level).
- Verify fallback provenance indicates built-in registry source.
- Isolated fixture-based tests for provenance serialization.
- Detailed logging assertions for provenance field correctness.

Relationship to bd-1kkl:
- This bead covers unit-level isolation testing.

 {"id":"bd-3huq","title":"Config + feature flags for NTM integration","description":"Goal:
- Add configuration controls for NTM integration.

Scope:
- Enable/disable NTM driver, poll interval, timeouts, session naming.
- Safe defaults and env var documentation.

Tests / Verification (detailed logging required):
- Unit: bd-2nr0 (config gating + defaults).

Definition of Done:
- Config is documented and used by NTM services.","notes":"Implementation:
- Added ntmConfigSchema to config.service.ts with:
  - enabled: boolean (default: true)
  - pollIntervalMs: number (default: 5000)
  - commandTimeoutMs: number (default: 10000)
  - maxBackoffMultiplier: number (default: 6)
  - wsBridge sub-config for WebSocket bridge settings
- Added env var overrides:
  - NTM_ENABLED, NTM_POLL_INTERVAL_MS, NTM_COMMAND_TIMEOUT_MS
  - NTM_MAX_BACKOFF_MULTIPLIER, NTM_WS_BRIDGE_ENABLED
  - NTM_WS_TAIL_POLL_INTERVAL_MS, NTM_WS_THROTTLING_ENABLED
- Updated index.ts to:
  - Load config at startup
  - Conditionally start NTM services based on config.ntm.enabled
  - Pass config values to NtmIngestService and NtmWsBridgeService
- All tests pass (12 throttling tests)","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:09:31.379888486Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T21:29:26.491844732Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T21:29:26.491664343Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["config","ntm"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3huq","depends_on_id":"bd-1khz","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:11:31.455548218Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3huq","depends_on_id":"bd-284u","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:09:31.577693777Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
